description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by red highlights along the receiver and handguard. The stock is solid and appears to be fixed, with a matte black finish that contrasts with the metallic silver barrel. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail, suitable for mounting various optics or accessories, though no sighting system is currently attached. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The barrel is long and slender, ending with no visible muzzle device, giving the rifle a streamlined appearance. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban tactical rifles.
description: A modern black and red tactical rifle with a fixed stock, long silver barrel, and detachable box magazine. It features a full-length Picatinny rail and a sleek, streamlined profile.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, long silver barrel, and red accents along the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard, with the muzzle clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the magazine and stock visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver, showing the symmetry and alignment of the rifle.
